summary: Frontend testing completed for Yrvante website updates - All 8 features verified. Extended FAQ (12 questions), updated calculator prices, new losse prijzen sections with tips, packages with delivery times, and new blog page all working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. FAQ section shows all 12 new questions on homepage ✓
2. Calculator page shows new prices: €50 (extra page), €200 (multilingual), €80 (extra form), €25/pm (maintenance), €250 (booking system), €120 (Google Reviews) ✓
3. Calculator page has 'Losse prijzen voor extra's' section with tip about combining extras ✓
4. Packages page (/pakketten) shows package details with delivery times (~ 1 week for Basis, 1-2 weken for Pro/Premium) ✓
5. Packages page shows 'Losse Extra's Toevoegen' section with all prices and tip ✓
6. Blog page (/blog) loads correctly with content about why websites are no longer a luxury and why agencies are expensive ✓
7. Blog page has comparison section showing Traditional (€3.000 - €8.000+) vs Yrvante (Vanaf €500) ✓
8. Footer on homepage has working link to /blog ✓
critical_code_review_comments: FAQ array properly expanded from 4 to 12 items with detailed Dutch content
Calculator prices object correctly updated with new values
BlogPage.jsx well-structured with bilingual (NL/EN) content support
context_for_next_testing_agent: Yrvante website updates completed. New pricing structure verified: €50 extra page, €200 multilingual, €80 extra form, €25/pm maintenance, €250 booking system, €120 Google Reviews. FAQ expanded to 12 questions. Blog page added at /blog with agency pricing comparison content. Packages page shows delivery times and losse prijzen section with tip about combining extras.
